title: Marker
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Marker helper with local inline SVG icons, spinner-backed status examples, separator and border variants, link-button rendering seams, and deterministic parity fixtures.
markdown:
# Marker

## Overview

Marker is a Foldkit-native port of the shadcn base-nova marker helper. It
renders inline notes, status rows, bordered rows, and labeled separators with a
small root/ icon/ content composition.

## Foldkit Model

Marker is a stateless render helper. It owns no Model, Message, update
function, or Command. Parent views decide what a marker means and render it as
a fact of the current UI state.

## Usage

Render the helper from a Foldkit view after binding `const h = html<Message>()`.
The root, icon, and content parts all accept `toView` seams when you need a
different tag.

```ts
Marker<Message>({
  variant: 'separator',
  children: [
    MarkerContent<Message>({
      children: ['Today'],
    }),
  ],
})
```

Use `variant: 'default' | 'separator' | 'border'` to match the origin shadcn
surface. The default variant covers inline notes, `separator` draws divider
lines on both sides of the label, and `border` adds a bottom rule for row
boundaries.

## Examples

The registry includes examples for default markers, loading status rows with
Spinner icons, border rows, separators, stacked icons, shimmer text, and
anchor/button rendering seams. The installable examples use local inline SVG
icons instead of `lucide-react`.

## Accessibility

Use `role="status"` for loading or streaming markers so assistive tech announces
the update when it appears. `MarkerIcon` is decorative by default and renders
`aria-hidden="true"`. Keep labeled separators short and readable.

## Foldkit Differences

The origin shadcn marker component imports React's `mergeProps` and `useRender`
helpers. This registry item replaces those dependencies with explicit Foldkit
attribute construction and `toView` seams, while keeping the same visible
marker footprint and class contract.

The origin notification example uses `sonner`. In the installable source, the
marker examples stay deterministic and local so they remain Foldkit-native.

registry.reason: Marker status examples compose the local shadcn Spinner registry item.
Marker uses local class canonicalization instead of CVA.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for the marker variant contract.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin React mergeProps usage is fixture evidence only and is replaced by explicit Foldkit attribute construction.
Origin useRender support is fixture evidence only and is represented by Foldkit toView composition seams.
Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure local class maps.
Origin icon usage is replaced by local inline SVGs in the installable examples.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin notification example usage is fixture evidence only; the installable source uses local static rendering seams.

examples.title: MarkerDemo
examples.description: Default markers with inline icons, spinner status, and a separator row.

examples.description: Status markers that announce loading with Spinner icons.

examples.description: Default, separator, and border marker variants.

examples.description: Markers with inline icons and a stacked icon layout.

examples.description: Bordered markers for row boundaries and implementation notes.

examples.title: MarkerSeparator
examples.description: Labeled separator markers for dates and section breaks.

examples.title: MarkerShimmer
examples.description: Streaming markers with shimmer text treatment.

examples.title: MarkerLinkButton
examples.description: Markers rendered as anchor and button controls through the local toView seam.

deviations.summary: The installable examples use local inline SVG icons instead of lucide-react and keep the notification example deterministic.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react or a client-side toast runtime. Local SVGs and static rendering seams preserve the visible marker footprint needed by the demos.
